cleavage agent: 10 µL of a 10 mg/mL solution of trypsin (Worthington)
collision energy: fragmented using a normalized higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) energy of 28
enrichment method: affinity purification of the anti-rhGAA ADAs
fragmentation method: fragmented using a normalized higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD)
instrument: using Orbitrap QE+ coupled to an Evosep One UPLC system
